cn.description:
Just Press Record 是终极录音应用，只需一键即可录音、转写并通过 iCloud 在所有设备上同步。 你可以编辑音频并且直接在应用内转写文本，还可通过 Siri 直接开始录制新内容！

生活充满了我们不愿忘记的时刻——比如你的孩子说的第一句话、一次重要的会议、一次灵光乍现。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的记录这些瞬间。

录音
• 一键即可开始、停止、暂停、继续录音。
• 通过快捷指令、Siri、小组件、三维触控的“快速操作”或 URL 方案来开始和停止录音。
• 录音时间无限制。
• 在后台仍可录音。
• 可选择录音源为内置麦克风、AirPods 或外置麦克风。
• 在 Apple Watch 上独立录音并可之后再同步。

播放
• 在播放过程中向后和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可调节。

转写
• 将语音识别为可搜索的文字。
• 支持超过 30 种语言，与您设备的语言设置无关。
• 同步文本突出显示和音频播放。
• 在录音时可以识别标点符号口令。

编辑
• 音频 - 以波形视图显示音频，让你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 对转写文本内容进行修改和添加。

分享
• 将音频和文字分享到其他应用。
• 作为视频片段简单分享到社交媒体。
• 通过 USB 连接线分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 打印转写文本。
• 在其他应用中将音频文件分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 查看最近的录音或按照日期时间浏览音频库。
• 按文件名或转写内容搜索。
• 用于快速访问 Apple Watch 录音的专用界面。
• 重命名录音。
• 支持 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在应用图标上添加了显示未播放录音的数字。

存储
• 选择将录音存储在 iCloud Drive 或设备本地。
• 存储在 iCloud Drive 的录音将自动在所有设备间同步。
• 录音通过“文件”应用集成和自动 iTunes 文件分享存储在本地。
• 转写内容与音频文件共同储存。

专业音频
• 在支持的设备上通过内置麦克风进行立体声录音。
• 支持通过 Lightning Port 连接的高质量外置麦克风。
• 自定义音频设置以增强您的录音体验。
• 文件类型包括 WAV、AIF 及标准 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音频质量最高可达 96kHz / 24-bit。

辅助功能
• 应用完全支持 VoiceOver 功能。
• 开始/停止录音支持智能手势操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 应用，让你随时随地，即使 iPhone 不在身边，也可以自由录音。

• 轻点功能栏即可开始录音。
• 在后台仍可录音。
• 录音时间无限制。
• 录音自动传输到 iPhone 进行转写并同步到 iCloud。
• 通过内置喇叭或 AirPods 聆听最近的录音。
• 通过 Digital Crown 表冠调节音量。
• 向下滑动即可暂停录音。
• 支持 VoiceOver 辅助功能，降低动作幅度，支持超大功能栏模版。

重要事项:
• Just Press Record 不会录制电话通话内容和来自其他应用的音频。
• 转写功能仅对高质量、低噪音的音频内容有效。  避免录音环境过于嘈杂，将麦克风尽量靠近说话人。
• 您可以在我们的常见问题页面上了解 Just Press Record 的 URL 方案。

三秒记一笔！快速、安全、好用是我们的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

cn.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
cn.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

cn.description:
从寒冷的城堡冻原，乘坐疾驰的火车穿过沙漠，直至最后的边界。 全力以赴从各种生存条件艰辛密室中逃脱出来。探索各具风格的密室，密室建有多层地板、屋顶、通风口和地下隧道。开发你的创造力，使用各种日用品（肥皂和袜子）或一些有趣的随手可见的餐具等物品（叉子或钢板）制造武器和工具。

【游戏玩法】：
-顶级特色密室：
全力以赴从世界上生存环境最艰苦的密室中逃脱出来。你需要遵守密室的规定，做各种工作并遵循严格的日常安排；所有的一切都是在努力为你争取自由，早日逃出密室！

-建立你的装扮：
从大量的定制中选择你的角色，使其独一无二。当你策划逃脱时，时尚装扮很重要。

-制定你的逃脱计划：
在监狱里，你要开发你的创造力，使用有限的工具来制作各种道具。你可以将日常用品（如肥皂和袜子）组合起来，制造新的武器和工具，以帮助你实现目标。也可以从自助餐厅拿到叉子，在房间里铺一条隧道，并通过杂志和胶带制作海报以隐藏痕迹。你将很快了解到，胶带解决一切！

-逃脱队组合：
联合最多 3 个朋友组建终极逃脱团队，并设计出最疯狂的逃脱计划！聚拢于沙发上，为你的暗中冒险做准备。通过合作，你将创建更加精细和勇敢的计划。感觉没有竞争性？你可以进入对战模式，并显示出你有能力比你的朋友更快地逃脱任何密室。如果其他一切都失败了，在密室天井上解决你的敌对目标！

-准备战斗：
《逃脱者：困境突围》引入了全新的战斗系统，使每个密室的战斗更加激动人心以及具有互动性。你可以保持攻击姿态并围绕你的目标走动，以在作战中获得上风；也可以在合适的时间格挡已减少伤害。确保你先到健身房锻炼肌肉！

-逃脱新方法：
随着密室越来越艰苦，你将不得不策划更加周密的逃脱计划。应对任何密室逃脱都有很多选择。尝试制作药物混合物来伪造自己的死亡，让太平间做剩下的工作！

【游戏特色】：
-最多4名玩家合作逃脱
-玩家之间可以联机对战
-超过 300 个角色装扮定制
-多层密室，给你最真实的场景体验

cn.sellerName: Xiamen Kuaibaoyou Network Technology Co., Ltd
cn.trackName: 打造世界-经典沙盒建造
cn.description:
《打造世界》结合了策略、方块建造沙盒以及塔防多种元素。游戏中，你不是一个人在战斗，需要带领矮人部落在这个充满危险生物的随机世界里进行探索，安排他们分工合作收集资源，制作需要的物品、武器和盔甲，以及建造城堡，来抵御危险生物的入侵。

【世界探索、沙盒生存】
游戏共有八个不同的世界（游戏本体4个地图+4个dlc地图），每个世界都是随机生成的岛屿，你可以在游戏中自由的改变地形地貌。不同世界有着各自的地理及生物特色，同时也暗藏各类怪物和BOSS。带上大聪明矮人征服各个世界吧！

【资源采集、制作发展】
游戏中挖掘矿藏、捕捉动物、打败敌人、种植农田等等方式获得原料；升级科技树，制作数百种完全不同的物品！要知道除了常规的武器、建筑材料、食物、炼金药水外，你甚至建造一个广大的矿井网，配上升降机和铁路，快速抵达藏有最珍贵金属的矿脉中。如何发展矮人部落，你可要好好思考一下。
对了，必须得告诉你，游戏中存在各种魔法，比如打开传送门，提高矮人运输资源的效率；使用魔法之光照亮黑暗的洞穴吓跑怪物；使用降水或是魔法森林加快树木成长，或者是使用指南针魔法找到隐藏资源，从而帮助加快资源开采，探索世界。

【自由建造、殖民管理】
发展一个部落可没那么容易，你需要安排矮人们的衣食住行，可以直接控制矮人进行挖掘、砍伐、攻击、建造等操作，并在矮人与怪物和BOSS战斗时使用魔法帮助他们。
在游戏刚开始时，你只有1位矮人，随着在这个世界的等级提升，会获得更多的矮人；而随着人数越来越多，部落规模也越来越大的。
部落的发展，建筑是必不可少的，发挥你天马星空的想象吧，无论是建古代宫殿风格、还是想要征服天空的空中住宅、又或者是结合现代科技坚不可摧的堡垒，只要你脑洞够大，创造独属于你的矮人之家！

【即时战略&塔防战斗】
有些怪物会成群结队的来掠夺矮人资源，有些怪物会定期从传送门而来攻打矮人，你需要带领矮人建立攻防系统，在的堡垒周围的路上设满陷阱和导弹塔，抵抗成群结队入侵而来的敌人。

【DLC拓展内容】
丰富的DLC内容拓展既可以带你领略不一样的世界：奇幻森林大冒险《奇境森林》、融合中式风格元素的《龙之神庙》、家园领地保卫战的《孤山世界》、暗黑领主和矮人的终极决战《邪恶之心》，还可以让你在世界探索中增加更多乐趣：女矮人携宠物及新装备登场的《姐妹连》、在神秘的斯芬克斯的沙漠世界探索神庙的《废弃矿山》、充满了植物和古老的魔法的《贪婪洞窟》，召唤英雄战士和法师的《英雄对决》，对抗更加强大的地下深渊头目的《怪物联盟》。以及更多DLC持续推出中。

"With a wonderful array of weapons, non-stop action, splendid graphics, eerie music and a wonderful adventure setting, Alien Shooter is a game that delivers on every front." - Game Tunnel

- Enjoy user friendly control schemes with auto-aim option available!
- stand up to the huge crowds of monsters appearing on one screen at a time
- level up, try out superhuman fighting abilities in an intense battle
- corpses of the monsters eliminated do not disappear - check out what happens at the end!
- compete with the gamers from all over the world use Game Center!

Mow them down and stay alive!

Just Press Record 從來不會在程式中用請求評分來打擾你——我們自己也不希望被打擾。 然而，App Store 的分數和評價的確很重要，所以如果你覺得 Just Press Record 很好用並且有那麼一點空餘時間的話，我們樂於在 App Store 上看到你的打分和評論。 感謝！
hk.description:
Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。

三秒記一筆！快速、安全、好用是我們的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

看看其他人怎麼說：
◎ 我本身係個要求高的人，但這個真的不錯！

增強功能：

hk.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
hk.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

hk.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

延續「1941 Frozen Front」的戰鬥，惟這一次，打的是海戰。加入海軍，打贏生死存亡之戰！稱雄戰場，派遣戰士奔赴前線。最真實的軍事作戰！
選擇正確戰術，運用突擊隊，擊潰頑敵！既可以在戰役中指揮美軍，也可以在戰鬥中統領日軍。步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種協同作戰，消滅敵軍幫兇；PACIFIC FRONT，以靈活的指揮技巧獲得晉升！

*** 任務簡報 ***

魚雷、炸彈，強大武器上陣作戰！
坦克、步兵，攻克敵人陣地！
轟炸機群，搗毀敵軍指揮部！
潛艇偷襲，令敵軍防不勝防！
在惡劣地形中佈置你的炮兵部隊！
清除灘頭、湖泊、海峽的各種障礙！
伏擊敵人！ 
為部隊提供物資和彈藥！
護衛航母及戰艦群！

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 以二戰為背景的回合制戰略行動遊戲
- 激動人心的戰役和充滿挑戰的任務
- 符合史實的美、日軍隊建制
- 美日雙方步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種一應俱全

-白熱化的多人戰鬥
- 六角網格可一覽無餘
- 細膩的圖片和極為真實的聲效
- 高難的搖滾配樂

感謝您選擇 '1942 Pacific Front'！

hk.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

hk.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

This is a SPECIAL version of the legendary Alien Shooter game, created upon the numerous gamers' requests from all over the world!
Try Survive mode, gain top results, share your achievements using Game Center and compete with the others across the Globe.

"With a wonderful array of weapons, non-stop action, splendid graphics, eerie music and a wonderful adventure setting, Alien Shooter is a game that delivers on every front." - Game Tunnel

Deserted military complex. Hordes of merciless creatures. Here you are. Your mission is simple – clear the base so there are just dead monsters' corpses left around.

- Enjoy user friendly control schemes with auto-aim option available!
- stand up to the huge crowds of monsters appearing on one screen at a time
- level up, try out superhuman fighting abilities in an intense battle
- corpses of the monsters eliminated do not disappear - check out what happens at the end!
- compete with the gamers from all over the world use Game Center!

Mow them down and stay alive!


REVIEWS:

- "A thoroughly enjoyable game, I totally recommend it." - binaryjoy.co.uk

- "It's hard to stop once you start." - AG.ru

- "All in all, I highly recommend Alien Shooter, especially if you loved the old Doom by ID's because, although substantially different, they share the same frenzy and the same immediacy of play. Definitely a great title." - retrogaminghistory.com

"Step forward Alien Shooter, which in the absence of any empirical studies, I'm happy to stake has a higher body count than all the Dooms, Dukes and Gauntlets put together. It's also a bloody good game with an arsenal of weapons any FPS would be proud of." - PC Zone Magazine

mo.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
mo.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

mo.releaseNotes:
本次更新修復了一些其他 bug 並提升了性能。

Just Press Record 從來不會在程式中用請求評分來打擾你——我們自己也不希望被打擾。 然而，App Store 的分數和評價的確很重要，所以如果你覺得 Just Press Record 很好用並且有那麼一點空餘時間的話，我們樂於在 App Store 上看到你的打分和評論。 感謝！
mo.description:
Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。

mo.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

mo.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

mo.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

mo.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

mo.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

This is a SPECIAL version of the legendary Alien Shooter game, created upon the numerous gamers' requests from all over the world!
Try Survive mode, gain top results, share your achievements using Game Center and compete with the others across the Globe.

"With a wonderful array of weapons, non-stop action, splendid graphics, eerie music and a wonderful adventure setting, Alien Shooter is a game that delivers on every front." - Game Tunnel

Deserted military complex. Hordes of merciless creatures. Here you are. Your mission is simple – clear the base so there are just dead monsters' corpses left around.

- Enjoy user friendly control schemes with auto-aim option available!
- stand up to the huge crowds of monsters appearing on one screen at a time
- level up, try out superhuman fighting abilities in an intense battle
- corpses of the monsters eliminated do not disappear - check out what happens at the end!
- compete with the gamers from all over the world use Game Center!

Mow them down and stay alive!

tw.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
tw.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。
tw.releaseNotes:
本次更新修復了一些其他 bug 並提升了性能。

Just Press Record 從來不會在程式中用請求評分來打擾你——我們自己也不希望被打擾。 然而，App Store 的分數和評價的確很重要，所以如果你覺得 Just Press Record 很好用並且有那麼一點空餘時間的話，我們樂於在 App Store 上看到你的打分和評論。 感謝！

tw.description:
--

獲獎：
● 日本 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT | 官方入選
● 韓國 2020 釜山獨立遊戲節 (BIC Fest) | 最佳休閒獎
● 台灣 2020 巴哈姆特 ACG 創作大賽 | 銅賞

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

tw.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

選擇正確戰術，運用突擊隊，擊潰頑敵！既可以在戰役中指揮美軍，也可以在戰鬥中統領日軍。步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種協同作戰，消滅敵軍幫兇；PACIFIC FRONT，以靈活的指揮技巧獲得晉升！

魚雷、炸彈，強大武器上陣作戰！
坦克、步兵，攻克敵人陣地！
轟炸機群，搗毀敵軍指揮部！
潛艇偷襲，令敵軍防不勝防！
在惡劣地形中佈置你的炮兵部隊！
清除灘頭、湖泊、海峽的各種障礙！
伏擊敵人！ 
為部隊提供物資和彈藥！
護衛航母及戰艦群！

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 以二戰為背景的回合制戰略行動遊戲
- 激動人心的戰役和充滿挑戰的任務
- 符合史實的美、日軍隊建制
- 美日雙方步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種一應俱全
- 戰鬥中可修理，偽裝，構築各種人員和建物
-白熱化的多人戰鬥
- 六角網格可一覽無餘
- 細膩的圖片和極為真實的聲效
- 高難的搖滾配樂

感謝您選擇 '1942 Pacific Front'！

tw.trackName: 女王的遊戲：盛世天下 媚娘篇
tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61579257674931
YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial
TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

※本遊戲內容涉及暴力，依遊戲軟體分級管理辦法分類為輔15級，十五歲以上之人始得使用。
※本遊戲為付費遊戲，且遊戲內亦另提供購買虛擬遊戲幣、物品等付費服務，請依個人興趣及能力進行適度消費。
※請注意遊戲時間，避免沉迷，長時間進行遊戲，容易影響作息，宜適度休息及運動。

tw.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tw.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

us.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
us.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

us.description:
Just Press Record is the ultimate audio recorder bringing one tap recording, transcription and iCloud syncing to all your devices. You can edit your audio and transcriptions right inside the app and even start a new recording completely hands-free with Siri!

Life is full of moments we would rather not forget - like your child’s first words, an important meeting or spontaneous idea. Capture these moments effortlessly on iPhone, iPad, Mac or for ultimate convenience, Apple Watch.

RECORD
• One tap to start, stop, pause and resume recording.
• Start and stop recording from the Lock Screen, Control Centre, the Action Button, Shortcuts, Siri, the Widget, a 3D Touch Quick Action or via the URL scheme.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Choose to record from the built-in mic, AirPods or external microphones.
• Record independently on Apple Watch and sync later.

PLAY
• Seek backwards and forwards during playback.
• Adjustable playback speed.

TRANSCRIBE
• Turn speech into searchable text.
• Support for over 30 languages, independent of your device's language setting.
• Synchronized text highlighting and audio playback.
• Format as you record with punctuation commands.

EDIT
• Audio - visualise your audio in the waveform view and cut out the parts you don’t need.
• Text - make corrections and add new text to your transcriptions.

SHARE
• Share audio and text to other apps.
• Share easily to social media as a video clip.
• Share to iTunes on Mac or PC via USB cable.
• Print a hard copy of your transcripts.
• Share audio files from other apps to Just Press Record. 

ORGANISATION
• View recent recordings or browse your library by date and time.
• Search by filename or transcription content.
• Dedicated tab for quick access to recordings made on Apple Watch.
• Rename recordings.
• Slide Over and Split View support on iPad.
• Add a badge to the app icon showing the number of unplayed recordings.

STORAGE
• Choose to store recordings in iCloud Drive or locally on-device.
• Recordings stored in iCloud Drive automatically sync across all your devices.
• Recordings stored locally benefit from Files app integration and automatic iTunes File Sharing.
• Transcriptions are stored within the audio file.

PRO-AUDIO
• Support for stereo recording from the built-in microphone on supported devices.
• Support for high quality external microphones connected via the Lightning Port.
• Customisable Audio Settings to enhance your recording experience.
• File types include WAV, AIF or standard iTunes M4A (ACC).
• High quality audio up to 96kHz / 24-bit.

ACCESSIBILITY
• VoiceOver support throughout the app.
• Magic Tap gesture to start / stop a recording.

APPLE WATCH
Just Press Record includes an Apple Watch app that gives you the freedom to record anywhere, even when your iPhone is not around.

• Start recording with a single tap on the Complication.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Recordings automatically transfer to iPhone for transcription and iCloud syncing.
• Listen to recent recordings through the built-in speaker or AirPods.
• Adjust volume with the Digital Crown.
• Pause recording with a downward swipe.
• Accessibility support with VoiceOver, reduced motion and support for the extra large Complication template.

IMPORTANT:
• Just Press Record does not record phone calls or audio from other apps.
• Transcription requires a good, clean audio signal.  Avoid recording in noisy environments and ensure the microphone is positioned close to the source.
• URL scheme implemented by Just Press Record can be found on our FAQ page.

In the spectacular action-adventure puzzle game and thrilling finale to the Tomb Raider origins trilogy, Lara Croft must save the world from a Mayan apocalypse and shape her destiny to become the Tomb Raider.

Important information regarding Shadow of the Tomb Raider:

The game is officially supported on the following Macs. To check your Mac model and when it was released, select About This Mac from the Apple menu on your menu bar.

 • All 13” MacBook Pros released since 2016
 • All Mac minis released since 2018
 • All 21.5” iMacs released since 2017
 • All 27” iMacs released since Late 2014
 • All 27" iMac Pros released since Late 2017
 • All Mac Pros released since Late 2013

Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

us.description:
Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. In Little Big Workshop you become a factory tycoon!

Real factories - made FUN
You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! 

An open-ended sandbox-experience
Take it easy, it’s a sandbox-experience where you think, ponder and poke at things until you get it to work the way you’d like. Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. No two factories should ever look the same.

Tiny hands, big dreams
Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. Soon enough you’ll be running multiple production lines, producing hundreds of advanced products each day, and watching with joy as your cute workers do the actual work.

Features:
- Varying industries and a wide range of products
- Focus on practical problems, not on values, economics, or logistics
- Organize all steps of the production on a blueprint
- Factories grow as you unlock more desk space
- Fully simulated Day/Night-cycle
- Take care of your workers! Work them too hard and they drop like flies
- Cute model-town art-style

The battle continues after “1941 Frozen Front” – and this time, it’s all about naval warfare! Join the navy and fight to win the battle of your life! Own the battlefield and send your soldiers to the frontline. Military combat at its best!

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

us.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tr.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
tr.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

tr.description:
Just Press Record is the ultimate audio recorder bringing one tap recording, transcription and iCloud syncing to all your devices. You can edit your audio and transcriptions right inside the app and even start a new recording completely hands-free with Siri!

Life is full of moments we would rather not forget - like your child’s first words, an important meeting or spontaneous idea. Capture these moments effortlessly on iPhone, iPad, Mac or for ultimate convenience, Apple Watch.

RECORD
• One tap to start, stop, pause and resume recording.
• Start and stop recording from the Lock Screen, Control Centre, the Action Button, Shortcuts, Siri, the Widget, a 3D Touch Quick Action or via the URL scheme.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Choose to record from the built-in mic, AirPods or external microphones.
• Record independently on Apple Watch and sync later.

PLAY
• Seek backwards and forwards during playback.
• Adjustable playback speed.

TRANSCRIBE
• Turn speech into searchable text.
• Support for over 30 languages, independent of your device's language setting.
• Synchronized text highlighting and audio playback.
• Format as you record with punctuation commands.

EDIT
• Audio - visualise your audio in the waveform view and cut out the parts you don’t need.
• Text - make corrections and add new text to your transcriptions.

SHARE
• Share audio and text to other apps.
• Share easily to social media as a video clip.
• Share to iTunes on Mac or PC via USB cable.
• Print a hard copy of your transcripts.
• Share audio files from other apps to Just Press Record. 

ORGANISATION
• View recent recordings or browse your library by date and time.
• Search by filename or transcription content.
• Dedicated tab for quick access to recordings made on Apple Watch.
• Rename recordings.
• Slide Over and Split View support on iPad.
• Add a badge to the app icon showing the number of unplayed recordings.

STORAGE
• Choose to store recordings in iCloud Drive or locally on-device.
• Recordings stored in iCloud Drive automatically sync across all your devices.
• Recordings stored locally benefit from Files app integration and automatic iTunes File Sharing.
• Transcriptions are stored within the audio file.

PRO-AUDIO
• Support for stereo recording from the built-in microphone on supported devices.
• Support for high quality external microphones connected via the Lightning Port.
• Customisable Audio Settings to enhance your recording experience.
• File types include WAV, AIF or standard iTunes M4A (ACC).
• High quality audio up to 96kHz / 24-bit.

ACCESSIBILITY
• VoiceOver support throughout the app.
• Magic Tap gesture to start / stop a recording.

APPLE WATCH
Just Press Record includes an Apple Watch app that gives you the freedom to record anywhere, even when your iPhone is not around.

• Start recording with a single tap on the Complication.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Recordings automatically transfer to iPhone for transcription and iCloud syncing.
• Listen to recent recordings through the built-in speaker or AirPods.
• Adjust volume with the Digital Crown.
• Pause recording with a downward swipe.
• Accessibility support with VoiceOver, reduced motion and support for the extra large Complication template.

IMPORTANT:
• Just Press Record does not record phone calls or audio from other apps.
• Transcription requires a good, clean audio signal.  Avoid recording in noisy environments and ensure the microphone is positioned close to the source.
• URL scheme implemented by Just Press Record can be found on our FAQ page.

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

tr.description:
Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. In Little Big Workshop you become a factory tycoon!

Real factories - made FUN
You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! 

An open-ended sandbox-experience
Take it easy, it’s a sandbox-experience where you think, ponder and poke at things until you get it to work the way you’d like. Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. No two factories should ever look the same.

Tiny hands, big dreams
Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. Soon enough you’ll be running multiple production lines, producing hundreds of advanced products each day, and watching with joy as your cute workers do the actual work.

Features:
- Varying industries and a wide range of products
- Focus on practical problems, not on values, economics, or logistics
- Organize all steps of the production on a blueprint
- Factories grow as you unlock more desk space
- Fully simulated Day/Night-cycle
- Take care of your workers! Work them too hard and they drop like flies
- Cute model-town art-style

tr.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tr.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios
